question: I am the beginning of eternity, the end of time and space, the beginning of every end, and the end of every place. What am I?
A girl has as many brothers as sisters, but each boy has only half as many brothers as sisters. How many brothers and sisters are there?
What is it that given one, you'll have either two or none?

I turn polar bears white and I will make you cry. I make guys have to pee and girls comb their hair. I make celebrities look stupid and normal people look like celebrities. I turn pancakes brown and make your champagne bubble. If you squeeze me, I'll pop. If you look at me, you'll pop. Can you guess the riddle?
Forward I am heavy, but backward I am not. What am I?
